title: US Distributors for DVD release
wikitext:
[]: US Distributors for DVD release?             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Tue Jan 08, 2008 12:16 pm Which US Distributor do you folks think may handle the English DVD versions of the four new animated Evangelion movies? ADV Films? Manga Entertainment? FUNimation? Or Other? I was gonna make a poll but the forums keeps telling me I have too many poll options.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Tue Jan 08, 2008 1:24 pm Really, I think a lot of people on this forum would want Evageeks themselves to do it. Because we'd do it better than anyone else...maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Tue Jan 08, 2008 3:53 pm Worst case scenario; Manga gets the license and gives us dubtitles. ADV might do a good job but look at how long it took before they released Platinum. I got a bad feeling Manga is going to get it. Maybe we’ll see a sequel to the commentary of evil.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:22 pm ok could we seriously start talking about Evageeks actually doing a Dub for it? Like money raising and stuff It would be really cool and It would make us the ultimate Eva site and V, Reichu, Aaron and Co.'s dreams would be realized I mean, couldnt we at least write a formal letter to the English/American company who gets the rights asking that we be hooked to the project OR AT LEAST be consulted so they are correct in thier dubbing and since we are Defintley more knowledgable then ADV on Eva

[]:             Quote Post by pikadourei » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:35 pm EvaCub wrote: ok could we seriously start talking about Evageeks actually doing a Dub for it? Like money raising and stuff It would be really cool and It would make us the ultimate Eva site and V, Reichu, Aaron and Co.'s dreams would be realized I mean, couldnt we at least write a formal letter to the English/American company who gets the rights asking that we be hooked to the project OR AT LEAST be consulted so they are correct in thier dubbing and since we are Defintley more knowledgable then ADV on Eva

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jan 08, 2008 5:50 pm We could always do a fandub - I have dibs on Shinji!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jan 08, 2008 6:32 pm Shinji with a British accent would totally be lulz but to get the part, you would have SCREAM REALLY REALLY GOOD

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 08, 2008 7:10 pm EvaCub wrote: ok could we seriously start talking about Evageeks actually doing a Dub for it?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Jan 08, 2008 10:34 pm Hey, I live really close to ADV. I could probably get past their security. And I'm pretty sure SSD is doing Shinji's voice. :P

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:07 am I call doing the voice of Toji! Or we could have auditions for the parts by uploading to a webspace. I have 1 gigabyte of webspace, I'd probably be willing to host people's voice files if they want to audition. The server is on centelia.net

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:10 am I don't think that we're going to do an Evageeks rebuild fandub...that's something we could get prosecuted for.

[]:             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Wed Jan 09, 2008 2:16 am I'd prefer to watch the movies the legal way, not the illegal way.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Wed Jan 09, 2008 8:09 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: Shinji with a British accent would totally be lulz but to get the part, you would have SCREAM REALLY REALLY GOOD

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Jan 09, 2008 11:29 am We should AT THE VERY LEAST contact whoever gets the rights so they don't slaughter it. No one wants a repeat of misleading information about Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:11 pm This is a goofy conversation. I'm hoping it goes to Sony Classics (new DVD release of PAPRIKA is quite nice) but most likely it will end up with ADVFilms or Manga. But seriously...Evageeks doing their own version. Sounds like it would be more fun as a novelty than anything worth investing in. But if there was voicing to had I'd like to Hyuga.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Wed Jan 09, 2008 12:52 pm I'd like to be the EVERY SINGLE MISSLE HIT THE TARGET guy.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Wed Jan 09, 2008 1:19 pm In my ideal world, we assist in writing or at least looking over the script as well as overseeing VA's for the dub, and then the major publishing company does everything else. And then Reichu can do her own commentary of doom.

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Wed Jan 09, 2008 1:47 pm This may be a dumb question, but can't the people who did the platinum edition of the show do Rebuild? I thought the picture and audio quality of that boxset was hot sauce. Really I could care less as long as Manga doesn't do it. I'm just not a fan. But then again, there's no vhs copy of Rebuild, so I mean, I really don't see how they can do bad here. I say that nervously.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jan 09, 2008 2:28 pm System Shocker wrote: I have 1 gigabyte of webspace.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 09, 2008 3:19 pm But that video is over a gigabyte. Also, you KNOW Tiffany Grant is aching to reprise Asuka.
summary:
[]: US Distributors for DVD release?             Quote Post by Vampire Killer » Tue Jan 08, 2008 12:16 pm Which US Distributor do you folks think may handle the English DVD versions of the four new animated Evangelion movies? ADV Films? Manga Entertainment? FUNimation? Or Other? I was gonna make a poll but the forums keeps telling me I have too many poll options.

[]:             Quote Post
